description: Analyze home appliance lifecycle data to determine repair versus replacement recommendations. Prioritize replacement decisions based on appliance age, industry repair rules, and energy costs.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with home appliance inventory including purchase dates, lifespans, repair costs, and energy usage. Calculate the age of each appliance, determine what percentage of its expected lifespan has elapsed, apply the 50% repair rule (don't repair if cost exceeds 50% of replacement), calculate annual energy costs, and create priority recommendations for which appliances should be replaced first.
